kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": true, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Projects\\RobotFramework\\RF_Pycharm\\log\\browser\\traces\\temp\\982cccbc-ec64-4847-b918-97722fb4704a"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.msg: { "acceptDownloads": true, "bypassCSP": false, "forcedColors": "none", "ignoreHTTPSErrors": false, "javaScriptEnabled": true, "offline": false, "reducedMotion": "no-preference", "serviceWorkers": "allow", "viewport": null }

{'acceptDownloads': True, 'bypassCSP': False, 'forcedColors': 'none', 'ignoreHTTPSErrors': False, 'javaScriptEnabled': True, 'offline': False, 'reducedMotion': 'no-preference', 'serviceWorkers': 'allow', 'viewport': None}
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: file://C:\Projects\RobotFramework\RF_Pycharm\resources/../pages/form.html

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=firstName at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Mervin' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Saib' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'mervin@example.com' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=successMsg at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
